scripts.build:cf: npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const copyDir=(s,d)=>{if(!fs.existsSync(d))fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(s).forEach(f=>{const ss=path.join(s,f);const dd=path.join(d,f);if(fs.statSync(ss).isDirectory())copyDir(ss,dd);else fs.copyFileSync(ss,dd)})}; copyDir('.open-next/assets','.open-next'); copyDir('public','.open-next'); fs.renameSync('.open-next/worker.js','.open-next/_worker.js'); fs.writeFileSync('.open-next/.nojekyll', ''); fs.writeFileSync('.open-next/_routes.json', JSON.stringify({ version: 1, include: ['/*'], exclude: ['/_next/static/*', '/assets/*', '/favicon.ico', '/logo.png'] }));"
scripts.preview: npm run build:cf && wrangler pages dev .open-next
scripts.deploy: npm run build:cf && wrangler pages deploy .open-next
scripts.upload: npm run build:cf && wrangler pages deploy .open-next
